blended.narrative: Chestnut Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 44°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: drizzle, highs of 44°F, winds around 21 mph.
Monday: 7" of snow, highs of 35°F, winds around 21 mph. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: light freezing drizzle, highs of 44°F.
